# Doc Traceability Validator Requirements
#
# This skill uses only Python standard library modules.
# No external dependencies required.
#
# Python 3.9+ is required for:
# - dataclasses (standard library)
# - pathlib (standard library)
# - argparse (standard library)
# - json (standard library)
# - re (standard library)
# - collections (standard library)
# - typing (standard library)
# - datetime (standard library)
# - sys (standard library)
#
# To run the scripts:
#   python3 validate_features.py --help
#   python3 validate_traceability.py --help
#   python3 generate_registry.py --help
#   python3 check_namespace.py --help
